show.title: The Last Human CEO
show.subtitle: A tragic dark comedy, narrated by Space Pirate Zero
show.author: Space Pirate Zero
show.description: In 2027, as corporate boards swap their CEOs for cheaper, scandal-proof AI, the last human chief executive in the Fortune 100 — Prescott 'Cope' Mercer IV, a charming, coke-addled fourth-generation Atlanta heir — wages a manic crusade to prove a person still belongs in the chair, right up until the machine taking his job quietly uncovers the thing he buried that got two people killed. A full-cast audiobook: Succession meets Flowers for Algernon by way of a Twilight Zone broadcast, transmitted to you by Space Pirate Zero. Contains strong language, drug use, sexual content, and depictions of suicide.
